title: Paper Log Entry
description: JSONL execution log entry for the paper pipeline. Each line in paper_log.jsonl is one command execution record. Supports auto-resume by tracking which stages completed, and provides an audit trail of all pipeline activity.

command.description: The slash command that was executed (e.g., '/paper:discover', '/paper:draft')

completed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when execution finished (null if still running or failed mid-execution)

status.description: Execution outcome. success=all steps completed, failed=stopped on error, partial=some steps completed

agents_invoked.description: List of agent names that were spawned during this execution

artifacts_produced.description: File paths of artifacts created or updated

artifacts_consumed.description: File paths of artifacts read as input

decisions.description: Autonomous decisions made during execution with rationale

resume_point.description: If status is 'partial', which step to resume from
